name: My work accident happened 6 months ago in West Valley City, is it too late to file?

mainEntity.name: My work accident happened 6 months ago in West Valley City, is it too late to file?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah requires reporting within 180 days; act now to avoid denial.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**In Utah, you have 180 days from the injury to report to your employer, but claims can proceed beyond if timely filed.**[5]

Workers' comp claims must be reported within 180 days, with formal filing deadlines varying by insurer response. Late reports risk denial unless good cause shown.

- Check exact date and any prior notifications.
- Delayed symptoms may extend timelines with medical proof.
- Statute for third-party suits is 4 years.[2]

Contact the insurer or Utah Labor Commission immediately. A lawyer can help preserve your claim despite delays.

description: Utah requires reporting within 180 days; act now to avoid denial.[5]
